articles.title_en: Over 500 Ukrainian drones strike 20 Russian regions and occupied Crimea overnight. Refinery hit in Yaroslavl, blackout across Crimea.
articles.lead_en: Russian air defense forces shot down 519 Ukrainian drones overnight on July 6, striking targets across more than 20 regions of Russia, occupied Crimea, and the Sea of Azov, the Defense Ministry said. The total number of drones launched in the attack is unknown; the ministry reported only those intercepted.

articles.title_en: Expert Maklakov named the biggest fakes about fuel in the Russian Federation
articles.lead_en: Among them are reports about the replacement of aviation kerosene with gasoline in passenger planes, as well as about the reduction of flights at airports, said the head of the department for combating the spread of false information of the Dialogue Regions ANO.
articles.title_raw: Эксперт Маклаков назвал самые крупные фейки о топливе в РФ
articles.lead_raw: Среди них сообщения о замене авиационного керосина бензином в пассажирских самолетах, а также о сокращении рейсов в аэропортах, рассказал начальник управления по противодействию распространению недостоверной информации АНО "Диалог регионы"
